001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
010import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
011import androidx.navigation.Navigation;
012import com.google.android.material.snackbar.Snackbar;
013import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
014import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.R;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.databinding.FragmentLoginBinding;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.LoginViewModel;
018
019/**
020 * Fragment for handling user authentication via Google Sign-In. Observes authentication state
021 * changes and navigates to the main fragment upon successful login.
022 */
023@AndroidEntryPoint
024public class LoginFragment extends Fragment {
025
026  private FragmentLoginBinding binding;
027  private LoginViewModel viewModel;
028
029  @Nullable
030  @Override
031  public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container,
032      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
033    binding = FragmentLoginBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
034    binding.signInButton.setOnClickListener((v) -> viewModel.signIn(requireActivity()));
035    return binding.getRoot();
036  }
037
038  @Override
039  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
040    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
041    viewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(LoginViewModel.class);
042    viewModel.getAuthenticationState().observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (state) -> {
043      switch (state) {
044        case AUTHENTICATED:
045          Navigation.findNavController(binding.getRoot())
046              .navigate(LoginFragmentDirections.navigateToMainFragment());
047          break;
048        case ERROR:
049          Snackbar.make(binding.getRoot(), R.string.login_error_message, Snackbar.LENGTH_LONG)
050              .show();
051          break;
052        case UNAUTHENTICATED:
053          // Do nothing, stay on login screen
054          break;
055      }
056    });
057//   viewModel.signIn(requireActivity());
058  }
059
060  @Override
061  public void onDestroyView() {
062    binding = null;
063    super.onDestroyView();
064  }
065}
